TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ma-te-li, title = Ma-te-li, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ma-te-li} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ma-te-li "Si-pang-ya a kamu, Madrid Si-pang-ya a kamu pangiha (ma'√į…ĺi√į) )nu Si-pang-ya angangan atukuy atu satabakiay a tukay, nu Ma-te-li saayaway a cen-hu nu satekeday a kitizaan, u kitizaan tini i Si-pang-ya teban nu kanatal a lala', Man-say-na-lye-s-a sa'wac panasul tu tukay. tukuyay a tademaw pakala tu 340 emang, kitizaan a tukayay a tademaw pakala tu 627.1 emang "2010 a mihcaan", palalecad macalap ku Si-pang-ya. ť¶¨Śĺ∑ťáĆ(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Madrid,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(ma'√į…ĺi√į) ) . knilaculan nipatizang tu tukay i 90 se-ci, i Muw-al tapiingan nu mapapacakayan a "Ma-ke-li-te" malumanay a kitizaan nu malahday a tukay, 1561 a mihcaan, Si-pang-ya a hungti ci Beo-li al-se angangana tukuy makay Tow-lye-tow malimad tayni, uyza micidek kakitizaan a kalamkam malahad, mala zikuz nu Si-pang-ya nu midebung hungti a kanatal nu kapulungan nu sapiculu' tu tuud, ayza nu Pa-say-long-na palalecad Si-pang-ya nu tusaay patahkal tu lalangawan a sacumud. tusa ku sakay hekalay a sasingalan nu lalangawan ŚÖ©Ś§ßŚįćŚ§ĖśĖáŚĆĖÁ™óŚŹ£. Ma-te-li atu capiay nisakaput tu Ma-te-li tabakiay tukay a kitizaan nu Ow-mung sakatulu nu tabakiay a tukuy nu kezayay, uyni dada' i Pa-li atu Mi-lan. Ma-te-li tusa i kitakit ku singangayay nu mitikuda tu mali a kasaupuan, hungtu a luma' Ma-te-li atu Ma-te-li nikasedsed tu nalimaan. namahini. i nikauzi a palalecad, kezay tahkal ku nisanga'an atu icibaay ku nitabaki, Ma-te-li nu timul a Ow atu I-pi-li a kasubal nu kahenulan nu kanakalay a gingku nu kitizaan, namahini nu Ow-cow atu La-tin-mey-coway nu angangan nu sapisuwbay a zazan, . hatu nu Si-pang-ya labuay nu kanatal a kusi nu pulung patizeng i Ma-te-li, mahiniay Si-pang-ya patelayay,kanatal a pahikukian a sakaput atu Si-pang-ya kanatal simal a kusian. zuma migingkiway a sakaput, mahiniay u Si-pang-ya hungti a luma' kamu a sye-yen atu Sey-wan-ti-s si-yen, zuma kanatal a sakaput, mahiniay pulungay a kanatal tungusay nu kitakit nu miliwkuay a sakaput "UNWTO" atu I-pi-li Mey-cow kanatal a sakaput "OEI" patizang tu cong-pu i Ma-te-li. ayzaay tu a mihcaan, masasumaay a lalangawan mikawaw i Ma-te-li malingatu palahad. angangan iza ku Si-pang-ya kanatal miliwkuay macacaka tu tuud a huy "FITUR",kucungay pipaazihan huy "ARCO", Ma-te-li patahkal paazih tu tyen-naw "SIMO TCI" atu Ma-te-li paazih tu zikuz. ŤŅĎŚĻī, (FITUR),ŤóĚŤ°ďŚćöŤ¶ĹśúÉ(ARCO),ť¶¨Śĺ∑ťáĆťõĽŤÖ¶ŚĪē(SIMO TCI)ŚíĆť¶¨Śĺ∑ťáĆśôāŤ£ĚŚĎ®. uyza i cen-ce,pasubana', pibalakasan, hekal, katuuday nu pahusuay, zikuc, ke-sye, lalangawan atu nalimaan u kahenulan kuyni, Ma-te-li mala u kanatal nu tabakiay a tukuy. duduc stu Monocle a zyasi 2017 a mihcaan pasiluc tu ngangan, Ma-te-li maala i kitakit u sakapahay a enengan a tukay tu saka 10 a nganga. Ma-te-li nu Si-pang-ya miliwkuay a tademaw u sakatusa a tukay, uynicacay I Pa-say-low-na. kanahatu izaw ku nu ayzaay a nisanga'an tu saidang, nika mahiza kapah Maliwan tu yadah ku ni likisi a sanga'an tu luma'. Si-pey-lay-s a putah atu mipesay tu nanum mahiza mala nu Ma-te-li tu a bacu. kanahatu ayzaay a Ma-te-li a kitizaan i ayaw nu nisulitan tu likisi a ziday izaw tu ku tademaw mauzip, nika Low-ma hungti kanatal a ziday Ma-te-li u tungus i Complutum a kiwkayan " ayzaay a Ay-na-lye-s-pow". nika makayniay Ma-te-li nu saayaway likisi a nisulitan u nu 9 se-ciay, Mu-han-mu-te cacay a lasubu a mihcaan pasakamu ayzaay Ma-te-li hungti a luma' a kitizaan m ipatizeng tu cacay adidi'ay a hungti a luma'. ComplutumśēôŚćÄ šĻčŚÖß. .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi "si-paŇč-ja a kamu, madrid si-paŇč-ja a kamu paŇčińßa (ma Ē~ °*…ĺi*) )nu si-paŇč-ja aŇčaŇčan atukuj atu satabakiaj a tukaj, nu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi saajawaj a ¶…ôn-ńßu nu sat…ôk…ôdaj a kitizaan, u kitizaan tini i si-paŇč-ja t…ôban nu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, man-saj-na-r~…ĺj…ô-s-a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ panasur~…ĺ tu tukaj. tukujaj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** …ômaŇč, kitizaan a tukajaj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ***.* …ômaŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan", par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku si-paŇč-ja. ***(****:madrid,******:(ma Ē~ °*…ĺi*) ) . knir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nipatizaŇč tu tukaj i ** s…ô- ¶i, i muw-ar~…ĺ tapiiŇčan nu mapapa ¶akajan a "ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô" mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan nu mar~…ĺańßdaj a tukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan, si-paŇč-ja a ńßuŇčti ¶i b…ôo-r~…ĺi ar~…ĺ-s…ô aŇčaŇčana tukuj makaj tow-r~…ĺj…ô-tow mar~…ĺimad tajni, ujza mi ¶id…ôk kakitizaan a kar~…ĺamkam mar~…ĺańßad, mar~…ĺa zikuz nu si-paŇč-ja nu mid…ôbuŇč ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tuud, ajza nu pa-saj-r~…ĺoŇč-na par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad si-paŇč-ja nu tusaaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a sa ¶umud. tusa ku sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a sasiŇčar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ********. ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi atu ¶apiaj nisakaput tu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi tabakiaj tukaj a kitizaan nu ow-muŇč sakatur~…ĺu nu tabakiaj a tukuj nu k…ôzajaj, ujni dada Ē~ ° i pa-r~…ĺi atu mi-r~…ĺan. ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi tusa i kitakit ku siŇčaŇčajaj nu mitikuda tu mar~…ĺi a kasaupuan, ńßuŇčtu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi atu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nikas…ôds…ôd tu nar~…ĺimaan. namańßini. i nikauzi a par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, k…ôzaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an atu i ¶ibaaj ku nitabaki, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu timur~…ĺ a ow atu i-pi-r~…ĺi a kasubar~…ĺ nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu kanakar~…ĺaj a giŇčku nu kitizaan, namańßini nu ow- ¶ow atu r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶owaj nu aŇčaŇčan nu sapisuwbaj a zazan, . ńßatu nu si-paŇč-ja r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a kusi nu pur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi, mańßiniaj si-paŇč-ja pat…ôr~…ĺajaj,kanatar~…ĺ a pańßikukian a sakaput atu si-paŇč-ja kanatar~…ĺ simar~…ĺ a kusian. zuma migiŇčkiwaj a sakaput, mańßiniaj u si-paŇč-ja ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kamu a sj…ô-j…ôn atu s…ô-wan-ti-s si-j…ôn, zuma kanatar~…ĺ a sakaput, mańßiniaj pur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ tuŇčusaj nu kitakit nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a sakaput "unwto" atu i-pi-r~…ĺi m…ô- ¶ow kanatar~…ĺ a sakaput "o…ôi" patizaŇč tu ¶oŇč-pu i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi. ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan, masasumaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mikawaw i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺańßad. aŇčaŇčan iza ku si-paŇč-ja kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwkuaj ma ¶a ¶aka tu tuud a ńßuj "fitu*",ku ¶uŇčaj pipaazińßan ńßuj "a* ¶o", ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß tu tj…ôn-naw "simo t ¶i" atu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi paazińß tu zikuz. **, (fitu*),*****(a* ¶o),******(simo t ¶i)*******. ujza i ¶…ôn- ¶…ô,pasubana Ē~ °, pibar~…ĺakasan, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, katuudaj nu pańßusuaj, ziku ¶, k…ô-sj…ô, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu nar~…ĺimaan u kańß…ônur~…ĺan kujni, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺa u kanatar~…ĺ nu tabakiaj a tukuj. dudu ¶ stu mono ¶r~…ĺ…ô a zjasi **** a mińß ¶aan pasir~…ĺu ¶ tu ŇčaŇčan, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi maar~…ĺa i kitakit u sakapańßaj a …ôn…ôŇčan a tukaj tu saka ** a ŇčaŇča. ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu si-paŇč-ja mir~…ĺiwkuaj a tad…ômaw u sakatusa a tukaj, ujni ¶a ¶aj i pa-saj-r~…ĺow-na. kanańßatu izaw ku nu ajzaaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu saidaŇč, nika mańßiza kapańß mar~…ĺiwan tu jadańß ku ni r~…ĺikisi a saŇča Ē~ °an tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. si-p…ô-r~…ĺaj-s a putańß atu mip…ôsaj tu nanum mańßiza mar~…ĺa nu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi tu a ba ¶u. kanańßatu ajzaaj a ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi a kitizaan i ajaw nu nisur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺikisi a zidaj izaw tu ku tad…ômaw mauzip, nika r~…ĺow-ma ńßuŇčti kanatar~…ĺ a zidaj ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi u tuŇčus i ¶ompr~…ĺutum a kiwkajan " ajzaaj a aj-na-r~…ĺj…ô-s-pow". nika makajniaj ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu saajawaj r~…ĺikisi a nisur~…ĺitan u nu * s…ô- ¶iaj, mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan pasakamu ajzaaj ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kitizaan m ipatiz…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ¶ompr~…ĺutum** **. .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ma-te-li "Si-pang-ya a kamu, Madrid Si-pang-ya a kamu pangiha (ma'√į…ĺi√į) )nu Si-pang-ya angangan atukuy atu satabakiay a tukay, nu Ma-te-li saayaway a cen-hu nu satekeday a kitizaan, u kitizaan tini i Si-pang-ya teban nu kanatal a lala', Man-say-na-lye-s-a sa'wac panasul tu tukay. tukuyay a tademaw pakala tu 340 emang, kitizaan a tukayay a tademaw pakala tu 627.1 emang "2010 a mihcaan", palalecad macalap ku Si-pang-ya. ť¶¨Śĺ∑ťáĆ(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Madrid,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(ma'√į…ĺi√į) ) . knilaculan nipatizang tu tukay i 90 se-ci, i Muw-al tapiingan nu mapapacakayan a "Ma-ke-li-te" malumanay a kitizaan nu malahday a tukay, 1561 a mihcaan, Si-pang-ya a hungti ci Beo-li al-se angangana tukuy makay Tow-lye-tow malimad tayni, uyza micidek kakitizaan a kalamkam malahad, mala zikuz nu Si-pang-ya nu midebung hungti a kanatal nu kapulungan nu sapiculu' tu tuud, ayza nu Pa-say-long-na palalecad Si-pang-ya nu tusaay patahkal tu lalangawan a sacumud. tusa ku sakay hekalay a sasingalan nu lalangawan ŚÖ©Ś§ßŚįćŚ§ĖśĖáŚĆĖÁ™óŚŹ£. Ma-te-li atu capiay nisakaput tu Ma-te-li tabakiay tukay a kitizaan nu Ow-mung sakatulu nu tabakiay a tukuy nu kezayay, uyni dada' i Pa-li atu Mi-lan. Ma-te-li tusa i kitakit ku singangayay nu mitikuda tu mali a kasaupuan, hungtu a luma' Ma-te-li atu Ma-te-li nikasedsed tu nalimaan. namahini. i nikauzi a palalecad, kezay tahkal ku nisanga'an atu icibaay ku nitabaki, Ma-te-li nu timul a Ow atu I-pi-li a kasubal nu kahenulan nu kanakalay a gingku nu kitizaan, namahini nu Ow-cow atu La-tin-mey-coway nu angangan nu sapisuwbay a zazan, . hatu nu Si-pang-ya labuay nu kanatal a kusi nu pulung patizeng i Ma-te-li, mahiniay Si-pang-ya patelayay,kanatal a pahikukian a sakaput atu Si-pang-ya kanatal simal a kusian. zuma migingkiway a sakaput, mahiniay u Si-pang-ya hungti a luma' kamu a sye-yen atu Sey-wan-ti-s si-yen, zuma kanatal a sakaput, mahiniay pulungay a kanatal tungusay nu kitakit nu miliwkuay a sakaput "UNWTO" atu I-pi-li Mey-cow kanatal a sakaput "OEI" patizang tu cong-pu i Ma-te-li. ayzaay tu a mihcaan, masasumaay a lalangawan mikawaw i Ma-te-li malingatu palahad. angangan iza ku Si-pang-ya kanatal miliwkuay macacaka tu tuud a huy "FITUR",kucungay pipaazihan huy "ARCO", Ma-te-li patahkal paazih tu tyen-naw "SIMO TCI" atu Ma-te-li paazih tu zikuz. ŤŅĎŚĻī, (FITUR),ŤóĚŤ°ďŚćöŤ¶ĹśúÉ(ARCO),ť¶¨Śĺ∑ťáĆťõĽŤÖ¶ŚĪē(SIMO TCI)ŚíĆť¶¨Śĺ∑ťáĆśôāŤ£ĚŚĎ®. uyza i cen-ce,pasubana', pibalakasan, hekal, katuuday nu pahusuay, zikuc, ke-sye, lalangawan atu nalimaan u kahenulan kuyni, Ma-te-li mala u kanatal nu tabakiay a tukuy. duduc stu Monocle a zyasi 2017 a mihcaan pasiluc tu ngangan, Ma-te-li maala i kitakit u sakapahay a enengan a tukay tu saka 10 a nganga. Ma-te-li nu Si-pang-ya miliwkuay a tademaw u sakatusa a tukay, uynicacay I Pa-say-low-na. kanahatu izaw ku nu ayzaay a nisanga'an tu saidang, nika mahiza kapah Maliwan tu yadah ku ni likisi a sanga'an tu luma'. Si-pey-lay-s a putah atu mipesay tu nanum mahiza mala nu Ma-te-li tu a bacu. kanahatu ayzaay a Ma-te-li a kitizaan i ayaw nu nisulitan tu likisi a ziday izaw tu ku tademaw mauzip, nika Low-ma hungti kanatal a ziday Ma-te-li u tungus i Complutum a kiwkayan " ayzaay a Ay-na-lye-s-pow". nika makayniay Ma-te-li nu saayaway likisi a nisulitan u nu 9 se-ciay, Mu-han-mu-te cacay a lasubu a mihcaan pasakamu ayzaay Ma-te-li hungti a luma' a kitizaan m ipatizeng tu cacay adidi'ay a hungti a luma'. ComplutumśēôŚćÄ šĻčŚÖß. .

ku siŇčaŇčajaj nu mitikuda tu mar~…ĺi a kasaupuan, ńßuŇčtu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi atu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nikas…ôds…ôd tu nar~…ĺimaan. namańßini. i nikauzi a par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, k…ôzaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an atu i ¶ibaaj ku nitabaki, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu timur~…ĺ a ow atu i-pi-r~…ĺi a kasubar~…ĺ nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu kanakar~…ĺaj a giŇčku nu kitizaan, namańßini nu ow- ¶ow atu r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶owaj nu aŇčaŇčan nu sapisuwbaj a zazan, . ńßatu nu si-paŇč-ja r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a kusi nu pur~…ĺuŇč patiz…ôŇč i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi, mańßiniaj si-paŇč-ja pat…ôr~…ĺajaj,kanatar~…ĺ a pańßikukian a sakaput atu si-paŇč-ja kanatar~…ĺ simar~…ĺ a kusian. zuma migiŇčkiwaj a sakaput, mańßiniaj u si-paŇč-ja ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kamu a sj…ô-j…ôn atu s…ô-wan-ti-s si-j…ôn, zuma kanatar~…ĺ a sakaput, mańßiniaj pur~…ĺuŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ tuŇčusaj nu kitakit nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a sakaput "unwto" atu i-pi-r~…ĺi m…ô- ¶ow kanatar~…ĺ a sakaput "o…ôi" patizaŇč tu ¶oŇč-pu i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi. ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan, masasumaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mikawaw i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺiŇčatu par~…ĺańßad. aŇčaŇčan iza ku si-paŇč-ja kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwkuaj ma ¶a ¶aka tu tuud a ńßuj "fitu*",ku ¶uŇčaj pipaazińßan ńßuj "a* ¶o", ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß tu tj…ôn-naw "simo t ¶i" atu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi paazińß tu zikuz. **, (fitu*),*****(a* ¶o),******(simo t ¶i)*******. ujza i ¶…ôn- ¶…ô,pasubana Ē~ °, pibar~…ĺakasan, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, katuudaj nu pańßusuaj, ziku ¶, k…ô-sj…ô, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu nar~…ĺimaan u kańß…ônur~…ĺan kujni, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺa u kanatar~…ĺ nu tabakiaj a tukuj. dudu ¶ stu mono ¶r~…ĺ…ô a zjasi **** a mińß ¶aan pasir~…ĺu ¶ tu ŇčaŇčan, ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi maar~…ĺa i kitakit u sakapańßaj a …ôn…ôŇčan a tukaj tu saka ** a ŇčaŇča. ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu si-paŇč-ja mir~…ĺiwkuaj a tad…ômaw u sakatusa a tukaj, ujni ¶a ¶aj i pa-saj-r~…ĺow-na. kanańßatu izaw ku nu ajzaaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu saidaŇč, nika mańßiza kapańß mar~…ĺiwan tu jadańß ku ni r~…ĺikisi a saŇča Ē~ °an tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. si-p…ô-r~…ĺaj-s a putańß atu mip…ôsaj tu nanum mańßiza mar~…ĺa nu ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi tu a ba ¶u. kanańßatu ajzaaj a ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi a kitizaan i ajaw nu nisur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺikisi a zidaj izaw tu ku tad…ômaw mauzip, nika r~…ĺow-ma ńßuŇčti kanatar~…ĺ a zidaj ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi u tuŇčus i ¶ompr~…ĺutum a kiwkajan " ajzaaj a aj-na-r~…ĺj…ô-s-pow". nika makajniaj ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu saajawaj r~…ĺikisi a nisur~…ĺitan u nu * s…ô- ¶iaj, mu-ńßan-mu-t…ô ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan pasakamu ajzaaj ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a kitizaan m ipatiz…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj adidi Ē~ °aj a ńßuŇčti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ¶ompr~…ĺutum** **. .
